blended.narrative: Silver Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,499 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 4" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 16.8" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 37".
